decisions.name: performance

decisions.name: architecture

decisions.name: requirement
decisions.reason: agents_forced (router_safety): spec §7.5 책임 분리 약속 + INT-US-05 검증 필요

decisions.name: scope

decisions.name: side_effect
decisions.reason: agents_forced (router_safety): PublicCafe24Operation 시그니처 변경 (label→labelKey) — /nodes/definitions 응답 shape 변경

decisions.name: maintainability
decisions.reason: agents_forced (router_safety): 소스 코드 변경 — 18 metadata 파일 + public-meta.ts + types.ts

decisions.name: testing
decisions.reason: agents_forced (router_safety): 소스 코드 변경 — public-meta.spec.ts assertion 정합성

decisions.name: documentation
decisions.reason: agents_forced (router_safety): spec §7.5 신설 + CHANGELOG + Rationale 갱신 + plan 문서

decisions.name: concurrency
decisions.reason: async/await·Promise·락·워커 변경 없음, 동기 메타데이터 리터럴

decisions.name: api_contract
decisions.reason: /nodes/definitions cafe24 extras 응답 shape 변경 (label→labelKey) 호환성 단절

decisions.name: user_guide_sync
